Off Calendar Feb-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF DIANA PENG, ALAN LEDESMA and RAY ABASOLO's Motion To Exempt An Award Of Damamges Or Settlement From Judgment Creditor's Claim is DENIED without prejudice as follows: (1) motion is premature; (2) moving party has not waived his right to claim exemption; (3) moving party shall re-file the motion, if appropriate, if and when the amount of recovery is known; (4) moving party shall supply current financial statement.
